title: 'They want to talk, and I agreed': Trump claims Iran seeking dialogue
content: President Trump stated in an interview that Iran's new leadership wants to talk, and he has agreed to discussions. He expressed confidence in an upcoming uprising, noting celebrations among Iranians and expatriates. Trump also indicated he would assess support for any potential uprising at the time it occurs.

title: America First, Diplomacy Last: The Peace President who went to war
content: Donald Trump, once a critic of 'endless wars,' now presides over a presidency marked by muscular interventions.  His second term features forceful actions in Venezuela and Iran, alongside territorial ambitions towards Greenland.  This shift from a 'peace president' to one employing high-stakes brinkmanship redefines 'America First' as forceful global reshaping, aiming for dominance rather than negotiated equilibrium.

title: Almost all US military bases hit by Iran: Is America unable to protect its assets in Middle-East?
content: Following the killing of Iran's Supreme Leader, Tehran launched a wide-ranging retaliatory campaign targeting US and Israeli military assets across the Middle East. Multiple Gulf nations reported missile and drone attacks, with US Central Command confirming three American service members killed. The scale of the strikes raises questions about regional air defence capabilities and potential escalation.

title: Pakistan, Venezuela & now Iran: Why Chinese-made weapons keep failing
content: Recent conflicts have exposed troubling vulnerabilities in Chinese weaponry. Pakistan's air defenses buckled against Indian missiles, Venezuela's radars went dark during a US raid, and Iran's systems faltered under airstrikes—patterns that point to shoddy engineering and weak software. Taken together, these incidents suggest systemic quality-control problems that erode buyer confidence and fuel a credibility crisis for China's arms industry.

title: After signing Pentagon deal, Sam Altman to Silicon Valley: You have double standards
content: OpenAI has secured a contract with the Department of War for classified network deployment, following a period of intense scrutiny. CEO Sam Altman defended the move, emphasizing long-standing discussions and the need to support the government's mission. He also criticized tech giants for demanding government action against China while refusing to assist, highlighting a perceived double standard.

title: Ice-cool Sanju Samson fires India into T20 World Cup semis
content: Pace or spin, Sanju Samson took the West Indies down with aplomb and never lost shape in the process. He hit the ball where it was meant to be hit but his ice-cool nerves stood out during his 50-ball 97*, which included 12 boundaries and four sixes. India will now face England in the T20 World Cup semi-final at Wankhede Stadium.

title: Sly Saudi-Israel alliance set up US attack on Iran
content: Saudi Arabia and Israel have quietly converged, driven by shared concerns over Iran's regional influence. Despite public diplomacy, Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman reportedly urged a US strike, warning of a stronger Iran if action was delayed. This alignment, fueled by geopolitical rivalry and Iran's nuclear ambitions, risks hardening sectarian divides and intensifying the struggle for Islamic world leadership.

title: CEO of America's largest bank Jamie Dimon says: We have displaced people for AI, and ...
content: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon urges businesses and governments to prepare for AI-driven labor disruption, emphasizing proactive planning over reactive measures.  The bank is embracing AI, already redeploying employees displaced by its adoption, and Dimon advocates for phased AI integration and retraining incentives to mitigate societal impact.

title: Rajpal Yadav reacts to Sonu Sood’s offer amid Rs 9 crore cheque bounce case
content: Actor-comedian Rajpal Yadav recently addressed the media in Mumbai amid the ongoing Rs 9 crore cheque bounce case, arriving at the press conference with his lawyer Bhaskar Upadhyay. During the interaction, he spoke about his legal battle, the support he has received and the scale of his upcoming work. Reacting to Sonu Sood’s recent comment about offering him work, Rajpal said, “Please get over the misconception that I need to keep asking for work."

title: Middle East crisis: What does it mean for India’s trade, exports, crude oil & LPG supply?
content: Exporters have raised strong concerns that the conflict could disrupt shipping through the Strait of Hormuz and the Bab el-Mandeb Strait, both of which are crucial maritime corridors.

title: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan: I was shocked to find China's Huawei has hired engineers who can...
content: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan expressed shock at Huawei's 100+ top CPU architects, developing alternatives to advanced tools and lithography. He warned China is rapidly closing the semiconductor gap through engineering and infrastructure optimization, even excelling in older tech. Tan also highlighted China's regulatory speed and the US trailing in open-source AI development, urging immediate action to maintain its chip advantage.

title: Tamil Nadu polls: PM Modi targets DMK over corruption, Katchatheevu; calls ‘no fear’ remark a badge of honour
content: Prime Minister Modi launched a scathing attack on Tamil Nadu's DMK, accusing leaders of prioritizing scams over public welfare and failing to protect state interests. Addressing a rally, he asserted NDA's victory in the upcoming elections, highlighting issues like Katchatheevu, Jallikattu, and women's safety, while also inaugurating development projects.

title: 'US crossed dangerous red line': Iran says has no option but to respond after Khamenei killing
content: Iran has issued a stark warning to the United States, declaring the killing of Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei a "dangerous red line" that necessitates retaliation. Following joint US-Israeli strikes, Iran launched a significant wave of attacks across the Middle East, targeting countries hosting US bases.

title: T20 WC: Zimbabwe team stuck in India amid closure of airspace in Middle East
content: After the US and Israel's airstrikes on Iran and their counter-attack on US military installations around the Gulf, it has affected the airspace in the global business hub of Dubai. Zimbabwe were due to fly out through that region on their way back home after a positive tournament.

title: Candace Owens’ bride of Charlie: Erika Kirk claims spark buzz
content: Candace Owens has made fresh claims in her “Bride of Charlie” series about Erika Kirk’s dating history and Charlie Kirk’s alleged private fears. Reports from RadarOnline, The Blast, International Business Times UK, and PrimeTimer highlight her comments. The claims have sparked debate, with questions raised about timelines, past image, and private conversations.

title: Angel Reese reacts as brother Julian signs two-way deal with Wizards
content: The Washington Wizards have signed rookie forward Julian Reese to a two-way contract, bringing him closer to his NBA debut. Reese, brother of WNBA star Angel Reese, previously played for the Raptors' G League affiliate. His sister expressed immense pride in his journey. Reese could potentially play against his former organization soon.

title: Charles Leclerc’s wife Alexandra Saint Mleux adopts new surname after wedding
content: It has now been confirmed that Formula 1 star Charles Leclerc tied the knot with his fiancee Alexandra Saint Mleux in Monaco around this weekend. The couple's post-wedding drive in a vintage red Ferrari in Monaco went viral. Now Alexandra has confirmed their wedding by changing her surname on Instagram along with a cute picture on her Instagram Stories.

title: Khamenei dead, Iranians flood streets: Trump wants protesters to ‘take over,' but can they?
content: Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei is dead, triggering celebrations and mourning across the nation. The US and Israel see this as an opportunity for regime change, while Iran's leadership signals escalation with retaliatory strikes. The country faces a critical juncture as popular anger clashes with the security apparatus's control.

title: T20 WC: South Africa coach's 'cupcake' jibe after another 'chokers' reminder
content: South Africa coach Shukri Conrad brought out the "cupcake" jibe after continuing their unbeaten run in the T20 World Cup with a win over Zimbabwe. He was asked about their infamous 'chokers' tag as they ready to face New Zealand in the semi-final at Eden Gardens on Wednesday.

title: Israel army destroys two Iranian jets ready to take off — watch
content: The IDF reported destroying two Iranian F-4 and F-5 fighter jets at Tabriz airport, ready for takeoff, as part of ongoing escalations. This strike, aimed at disrupting the Iranian air force and defense systems, follows joint US-Israel strikes in Iran. Military analysts note that targeting ground aircraft significantly impacts operational readiness during heightened tensions.

title: ICAI CA final result 2026 released: Check direct link to download scorecards here
content: The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) has announced the CA Final Examination January 2026 results on March 1, 2026. Candidates can now access and download their scorecards from the official website, icai.nic.in, by entering their registration and roll numbers. Clearing this final stage makes candidates eligible for ICAI membership.

title: Oil tanker hit near Oman in Strait of Hormuz; 15 Indians evacuated
content: An oil tanker, the Skylight, was attacked off Oman's coast, injuring four crew members and prompting an evacuation. This incident follows Iran's warning to close the vital Strait of Hormuz, a key global oil route. Shipping giants are suspending transit, and insurers are withdrawing cover, raising fears of severe global energy market disruption amid escalating regional tensions.

title: Don’t judge her saree: The inspiring story of English speaking 'dehati madam'
content: Yashoda Lodhi, known as "English with Dehati Madam," is a farmer from Uttar Pradesh who is teaching English to thousands in rural India. Using her smartphone and everyday village life as a classroom, she breaks down language barriers with authenticity and warmth, inspiring confidence in her followers.

title: 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' set to be nearly 4-hour long; makers eye Holi for trailer release
content: After the massive success of Ranveer Singh's Dhurandhar, which surprised many with its 3-hour-34-minute runtime and still emerged as a box office phenomenon, the makers are pushing the envelope further with Dhurandhar: The Revenge. The sequel, riding high on unprecedented buzz, is now said to be even longer than the first part.

title: T20 World Cup: Sikandar Raza restores Zimbabwe's pride, albeit in losing cause
content: Zimbabwe skipper Sikandar Raza's all-round performance, including a 73-run knock and three wickets, nearly led his team to an upset against South Africa. Despite a strong effort, South Africa secured a five-wicket victory, maintaining their unbeaten run in the T20 World Cup Super Eight.

title: Perfect farewell: Healy finishes on a high as Australia sweep India 3-0 in ODIs
content: Alyssa Healy concluded her ODI career with a brilliant century, scoring 158 as Australia posted 409/7. Beth Mooney also contributed an unbeaten 106, leading Australia to a commanding 185-run victory over India in the final ODI. This win secured a 3-0 series sweep for Australia.

title: Half the missiles gone? How vast Iran’s arsenal is — expl​ained
content: Israel claims to have destroyed half of Iran's missile stockpiles during a June 2025 war, though Tehran is actively rebuilding its arsenal. Despite battlefield losses, Iran's extensive missile program, focusing on precision and solid fuel technology, remains a key element of its regional deterrence strategy.

title: ‘Cynical violation of law’: Russia, China condemn killing of Khamenei in US-Israel strikes
content: The assassination of Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei in US-Israeli strikes has ignited sharp criticism from Russia and China, who decry the act as a violation of international law and sovereignty. Both nations urge an immediate halt to military operations, highlighting escalating regional instability and a widening geopolitical divide.

title: Esha Gupta says she’s safe in Abu Dhabi amid Middle East crisis
content: Esha Gupta assured fans she's safe in Abu Dhabi amid Middle East missile tensions: "Times are scary, but we're ok. God protects us." Sonal Chauhan sought PM Modi's help, stranded in Dubai. Vishnu Manchu shared video of missiles scaring his son there, praising UAE defenses.

title: Iran fired missiles towards UK bases in Cyprus, says defence secretary
content: Iran fired two missiles towards Cyprus, where the UK has military bases, with Defence Secretary John Healey stating the attacks showed indiscriminate retaliation. He confirmed UK military personnel were near missile strikes in Bahrain, emphasizing the need for Iran to halt its actions and weapons programs.

title: Basmati rice exports to be hit by Strait of Hormuz restrictions? Top 5 destinations
content: The Strait of Hormuz is a narrow maritime passageway which is not only important for the transit of around 202-25% of the world’s crude oil trade, but also for trade in other crucial commodities.

title: 'Help has arrived': Netanyahu sends message to Iran citizens, warns of more strikes
content: In the wake of Iran's supreme leader Ayatollah Khamenei's death in a joint US-Israel strike, Netanyahu warned to hit thousands of targets, framing the moment as a historic window for Iranians to challenge the regime. Reports describe coordinated operations targeting critical Iranian military hubs and infrastructure, aiming to dismantle the government and remove threats.

title: Who is Ayatollah Alireza Arafi? Iran’s interim Supreme Leader after Khamenei’s death
content: Iran has appointed Ayatollah Alireza Arafi as interim supreme leader following the death of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. Arafi, a seasoned cleric with deep ties to the establishment, faces the immense task of navigating regional tensions and internal instability. His elevation signifies a crucial leadership transition, testing Iran's political resilience as it seeks a permanent successor.

title: Bairstow, Flintoff, England Lions stuck in Dubai amid Middle East tensions
content: England Lions and Pakistan Shaheens are stranded in Dubai after Iran’s air strikes led to UAE airspace closure, cancelling their match. Jonny Bairstow, Andrew Flintoff, and others are stuck. The ECB says, “The safety and security of our teams and staff is our top priority,” while Bairstow sought flight updates on X.

title: 'We are stuck here': Blast near Dubai airport clouds Sindhu's All England opener
content: Two-time Olympic medallist P V Sindhu and her coach faced a terrifying ordeal at Dubai International Airport after an explosion near their location. Stranded due to flight suspensions amid Middle East tensions, they are anxiously awaiting departure for the All England Championships. The Badminton World Federation is monitoring the situation closely, prioritizing player safety.

title: Where was Khamenei when he was killed in strike? IDF issues statement
content: The Israeli military confirmed a large-scale operation killed Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei in Tehran.  The IDF stated Khamenei was responsible for years of repression and aimed to destroy Israel, leading a terror axis.  His elimination marks the end of a significant chapter, according to the military.  Iran's government acknowledged the US-Israeli strikes shortly after.

title: 'Go back to your senses': UAE tells Iran after attacks on Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Doha and Kuwait
content: The United Arab Emirates has called on Iran to reconsider its actions. Iran launched military strikes across the Middle East, including attacks on Dubai. These actions follow the reported killing of Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. Dubai experienced significant disruption with explosions and damage to infrastructure. Local authorities reported injuries and partial damage to the main airport.

title: Iran strikes Gulf states, even mediator Oman – why its strategy could backfire
content: Iran has escalated its conflict by targeting Gulf Arab states, including Oman and the UAE, in a bid to pressure the US. Analysts suggest this move risks pushing regional powers closer to Washington, despite Iran's aim to compel de-escalation. The strikes, hitting civilian areas and ports, signal a broader regional involvement, potentially forcing Gulf nations to reconsider their stance.

title: Sources: Vikings to trade or cut Jones, Hargrave
content: The Vikings have informed running back Aaron Jones and defensive tackle Javon Hargrave that, barring a trade, they will be released at the start of the 2026 league year, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: L.A. Kings fire coach Hiller; name Smith interim
content: The Kings have fired coach Jim Hiller after two seasons and named associate head coach D.J. Smith as the team's interim. Los Angeles is three points out of a wild-card spot.

title: Alongside Hughes bros, Knight jokes back on 'SNL'
content: Hilary Knight appeared on "Saturday Night Live" along with U.S. women's hockey teammate Megan Keller and men's team brothers Jack and Quinn Hughes, and Knight quipped, "It was going to be just us, but we thought we'd invite the guys too."

title: Staley: Working to bring home ex-players in Israel
content: South Carolina coach Dawn Staley said on social media Saturday that the school is working to try to help a few former players return home from Israel, where they are playing.

title: UT joins No. 1s in women's NCAA seed projections
content: Texas joined UConn, UCLA and South Carolina as the No. 1 seeds in the women's NCAA basketball tournament's latest projections announced Sunday, with Iowa and Oklahoma making the biggest jumps.

title: MSU's Thompson blazes combine-best 4.26 in 40
content: Mississippi State's Brenen Thompson clocked a 4.26-second 40-yard dash Saturday, the third fastest by a wide receiver at the combine since 2003.

title: Cards' Marmol gets 2-year extension amid rebuild
content: Oliver Marmol, who has a 325-323 record as manager of the Cardinals over four seasons, has signed a two-year extension that includes a club option for 2029.

title: Kerr walks back comments on Porzingis' diagnosis
content: Warriors center Kristaps Porzingis will miss a fourth straight game on Saturday night due to general illness.

title: 🏈 Best NFL combine workouts and draft risers
content: Top prospects such as David Bailey and Ohio State's linebacker duo starred. Here are our experts on the combine's top workouts.

title: Takeaways: Only one surprising outcome at Elimination Chamber
content: The title matchups for WrestleMania 42 are nearly set, but there is only one pairing that we didn't see coming.

title: New intel on the QB market, potential trades and top NFL free agents: What we heard at the combine
content: What will the Vikings, Cardinals, Colts and Dolphins do at QB? Has the A.J. Brown and Maxx Crosby trade buzz quieted? Which free agents are getting interest?

title: Bracketology watch guide: How Saturday changed the top lines and the bubble
content: How Saturday's slate shook up some bubble spots and top lines -- except Duke's hold on No. 1 overall.

title: Bracketology: UNC inching closer but still outside of top 16
content: The Tar Heels are in third place in the ACC and have won 11 of their past 12 games, but they remain a No. 5 seed.

title: Where would Fernando Mendoza rank among Round 1 QBs over the past five years?
content: Let's rank every quarterback picked in Round 1 from 2021 to 2025 based on predraft evaluations -- and then slot in the expected No. 1 pick for 2026.

title: Inside the secret history of the black mamba
content: In late 2002, Nike began creating a global campaign featuring the black mamba -- and presented it to an NBA superstar. That star was not Kobe Bryant.

title: Do USWNT up-and-comers have a shot at the Women's World Cup roster?
content: The USWNT's roster for the SheBelieves Cup had eight players with six caps or less. Are these youngsters competing for World Cup spots?

title: Man United up to third as Sesko's hot streak of crucial goals continues
content: Man United are flying and so is Benjamin Sesko, whose match-winning strike against Crystal Palace is just the latest in a run of important goals.

title: Your guide to the Unrivaled playoffs: Breeze and Vinyl advance to semifinals
content: The Phantom will face the Vinyl and the Mist play the Breeze in the semifinals on Monday in Brooklyn.

title: Draft guide: Rankings, tips, strategy, stats and more
content: All the rankings, projections, cheat sheets, strategy and analysis you need for the 2026 fantasy baseball season.

title: Betting buzz: Kon Knueppel overtakes Cooper Flagg as NBA Rookie of the Year favorite
content: Kon Knueppel's hot play has shaken up the Rookie of the Year odds, as the Hornets' star passes Cooper Flagg as the favorite.

title: Transfer rumors, news: MLS an option as Salah 'increasingly likely' to leave Liverpool
content: MLS and the Saudi Pro League are both "possible options" for Liverpool's Mohamed Salah this summer. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: A map to guide you through Bengaluru’s pink Tabebuia bloom
content: The bloom-tracking system works through a community-driven model supported by two data sources: GBA’s census data and user contributions

title: Fire breaks out at Nellore GGH, no casualties reported
content: Short-circuit in maternity ward triggers blaze; patients shifted to other blocks and private hospital as Collector and SP oversee relief measures

title: Indians among those injured in Iranian strikes, says UAE
content: Ongoing conflict between U.S.-Israel alliance and Iran send waves across West Asia; oil tanker with Indians among crew hit off Oman, passengers stranded as flight disruptions; 8 Indians stuck in Karachi airport after aircraft diversion over the conflict

title: 463 trees of 34 species: Cost of Orange Line Metro realignment in Nagarabhavi
content: According to the original plan, the initial alignment passed along the Outer Ring Road, from Dwaraka Nagar station to Chowdeshwari Nagar station, which residents claimed will have resulted in at least 90% less environmental destruction

title: BJP begins campaign for Bengal Assembly elections with Parivartan Yatras
content: Senior party leaders flag off four Parivartan Yatras in four different corners of the State. On March 2, five more will be flagged off in the State. All nine yatras will conclude with a public rally of Prime Minister Narendra Modi at Kolkata’s Brigade Parade Grounds

title: Opposition parties condemn killing of Iran's leader Khamenei as ‘immoral, unlawful’
content: In Jammu and Kashmir, various parties, including the ruling National Conference, also deplored the U.S.-Israel attacks on Iran

title: Amit Shah asks Punjab govt. to act against ‘religious conversions’
content: Amit Shah invokes the sacrifice of Guru Tegh Bahadur while addressing the ‘Hind-Di-Chadar’ event to mark the 350th martyrdom anniversary of Guru Tegh Bahadur in Kharghar

title: Indian airlines cancel 350 flights to West Asia and beyond
content: The UAE announces it will cover accommodation and sustenance costs for stranded passengers in the wake of the war between Israel-U.S. and Iran

title: Maharashtra-Canada ties poised for dynamic growth: Fadnavis
content: At Mumbai reception for Canadian leaders, Maharashtra Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis pitches State as hub for infrastructure, AI, climate finance, and higher education investment.

title: INFINITUS 2026 concludes on a high note at SRM University A.P.
content: Over 6,500 students from across the country take part in four-day techno-cultural extravaganza featuring performances by Karthik and Jonita Gandhi

title: Congress slams Vijayawada MP over stalled flyovers, bypass
content: Kolanukonda Shivaji seeks action on Singh Nagar and Nidamanuru corridor projects amid worsening traffic congestion

title: MHA cautions States against possible violence in the wake of U.S.-Israel military strikes against Iran
content: As thousands took to the streets to protest Khamenei’s killing, MHA asked States to watch protests by friends and foes of the Iranian regime, monitor radicals; says likely targets are embassies, tourist sites

title: GBA and BDA to draft separate Revised Master Plan
content: The new draft is only expected in 2027, which will be 12 years after the last Revised Master Plan was due. The master plan in force was drafted in 2005.

title: ‘Sleaze’ video: TTD Chairman B.R. Naidu warns of action against those resorting to smear campaign
content: He dismissed as uncivilised the attempts of YSRCP leader Bhumana Karnunakar Reddy to tarnish his image

title: Kerala Chief Minister’s moment with young landslide survivor takes political turn
content: The child had gained national attention after Prime Minister’s interaction with her during his visit to a hospital in Wayanad soon after the Mundakkai-Chooralmala landslides

title: Chief Justice of India Surya Kant stresses on building a ‘mediation culture’ for resolving disputes amicably
content: It is gaining greater acceptance as an effective tool for dispute resolution, and the process has statutory backup in the Mediation Act of 2023, he observes; Chief Minister Chandrababu Naidu urges the CJI to consider establishing National Judicial Academy in Amaravati

title: Kakani, Somireddy trade charges over ₹100 crore land row in Nellore
content: YSRCP leader alleges sale of 40 acres of government land worth ₹100 crore; Sarvepalli MLA denies charge, says disputed land will be handed over to NUDA for NTR Township development

title: Iran Claims Carrier Abraham Lincoln "Struck" By Missiles. Not Hit, Says US
content: Iran's Revolutionary Guards today said they attacked the aircraft carrier USS Abraham Lincoln in the Gulf after the US and Israeli strikes killed the country's supreme leader, Ayatollah Khamenei.

title: Israel Hacked Iranian Prayer App, Urged IRGC To Betray The Regime: Report
content: Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was killed in a series of military strikes on Tehran carried out by the United States and Israel, Iranian state media confirmed on Sunday.

title: 165 Ballistic Missiles And 541 Drones: UAE Counts What Iran Sent
content: Iran has fired at least 165 ballistic missiles on the United Arab Emirates (UAE) since yesterday, the UAE's Defence Ministry said in a statement today. Of this, the UAE's air defence network destroyed 152. The remaining 13 fell into the sea, it said.

title: US-Israel Attacks Iran LIVE Updates: More Explosions Heard In Dubai, Doha And Manama
content: US-Israel Attacks Iran LIVE Updates: Iran's President Masoud Pezeshkian said Sunday that the killing of supreme leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei in US and Israeli strikes was a "declaration of war against Muslims".

title: Will India Have Enough Oil If Iran War Escalates? Oil Reserves At A Glance
content: The US-Israel war on Iran getting into its stride now, India is calculating its oil reserves in case of a possible crisis.

title: "Will Forcefully Crush Enemy's Bases": Iran President After Khamenei's Death
content: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian today announced the interim leadership council formed after supreme leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was killed in a US-Israel strike has started working on their important tasks.

title: 8 Dead In Fresh Iran Strikes On Israel's Beit Shemesh In Response To Khamenei's Killing
content: The death count from an Iranian missile attack Sunday in the Israeli city of Beit Shemesh rose to at least nine people, first responders said, in the deadliest strike in the country since the war began.

title: Why Ayatollah Khamenei Kept One Hand Hidden Beneath His Cloak For 45 Years
content: Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was killed in his office on Saturday in the most ambitious joint attack by Israel and the United States on Iranian targets in decades.

title: When Khamenei Said He Was "Truly Not Worthy" Of Supreme Leadership
content: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei once said he was “truly not worthy” of Iran’s Supreme Leader role, reflecting the complex path that led him to power.

title: When Young Ali Khamenei, Before He Took On Ayatollah Role, Visited Karnataka
content: A village in Karnataka's Chikkaballapur has announced a three-day mourning period as a mark of tribute to Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, Iran's supreme leader, who was killed in the opening salvo of a massive US and Israeli attack.

title: New Explosions In Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Doha, Manama As Iran Retaliates
content: Residents have reported hearing fresh explosions in Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Doha, and Manama today, as Iran continues to fire missiles at countries in the Middle East where US troops are stationed.

title: 3 Killed, 14 Injured After Shooting At Texas Bar, Suspect Among Those Dead
content: Authorities say three people were killed and 14 others were wounded after a shooting at a bar in Austin, Texas.

title: Who Is Ahmad Vahidi? New Chief Of Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps
content: Iran has named Ahmad Vahidi, a former defence and interior minister, as the new commander of the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps.

title: Iran Raises Red Flag Over Mosque After Khamenei Killing. What It Means
content: In a symbolic gesture signalling retaliation, a red "flag of revenge" was raised over the dome of the Jamkaran Mosque, which is a site of religious significance for Iran.

title: NDTV Explainer: How Is A Supreme Leader Chosen, Who Will Succeed Khamenei
content: Iran has appointed senior cleric Alireza Arafi as the jurist member of a temporary Leadership Council following the reported death of its Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei in joint US-Israeli air strikes, according to state media.

title: Alireza Arafi Appointed To Iran's Leadership Council After Ayatollah Ali Khamenei Killed In US-Israel Strikes
content: Senior Iranian leader Alireza Arafi was on Sunday appointed as the jurist member of Iran's Leadership Council, a body tasked with fulfilling the Supreme Leader's role until the Assembly of Experts elects a new leader, Iranian state media reported.

title: Bahrain's 5-Star Hotel Complex Shrouded In Smoke Amid Iran's Retaliation
content: Several videos have surfaced on social media showing clouds of smoke rising from the Crowne Plaza Manama, a five-star hotel complex in Bahrain, amid Iran's retaliation for US-Israeli strikes.

title: Israel Shares Aerial Footage Of Bombing "Iran's Terror Regime" In Tehran
content: Has Iran's top defence and civil-religious leadership been wiped out in the joint American and Israeli airstrikes?

title: Iran Attacks Oil Tanker In Strait Of Hormuz, 15 Indian Crew Members On Board
content: Iran has attacked an oil tanker passing through the Strait of Hormuz near the coast of Oman as it retaliates with all its might to avenge the assassination of Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei by the US and Israel.

title: Khamenei Dead But Is Trump's Iran Problem Over? New US Challeges Explained
content: On Saturday morning, Israel, with the support of the United States, carried out sudden, yet extensive, airstrikes against Iran, killing its Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei marking a dramatic escalation in hostilities in the Middle East.

title: Heavy rush at Kanaka Durga temple, arrangements in place for Maha Kumbhabhishekam
content: Preparations in full swing for Maha Kumbhabhishekam, a grand ritual held once every 12 years at Sri Durga Malleswara Swamy Devasthanam; the three-day event is scheduled from March 6 to 8 this year

title: Andhra Pradesh achieves record GST collection in February 2026
content: The 5.45% growth compared to February 2025 signals a robust economic trajectory despite significant tax cuts introduced under the GST 2.0, says official

title: Left parties condemn military action by U.S. and Israel on Iran
content: It is a grave violation of international law and Iranian sovereignty, they say, and demand the Government of India to condemn the strikes

title: CPI(M) general secretary M.A. Baby condemns U.S.-Israel attacks on Iran, killing of Khamenei
content: Indian Union Muslim League leader Sayyid Munavar Ali Shihab Thangal pays tribute to Iran's supreme leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei who was killed in the attack

title: KSRTC rolls out major reforms
content: Transport Minister K.B. Ganesh Kumar reveals that the corporation is shifting toward more passenger-centric services

title: Courts must instil confidence in public on delivery of justice: CJI
content: Chief Justice of India Surya Kant lays foundation stone for a new court complex at Daminedu, Tirupati rural mandal

title: Police, MVD uncover bid to alter details of stolen vehicles
content: It was the Marad police who recently detected a stolen vehicle with a fake registration number and a tampered chassis, suggesting that more gangs may be operating in the illegal trade

title: Government failed to ensure MSP for farmers, alleges YSRCP
content: Citing the distress among chickpea and maize farmers, YSRCP leader Nagi Reddy accuses the government of  making false statements in the Assembly, besides flagging delays in completing the e-crop registration process

title: Bengal’s Muslim districts have highest number of cases awaiting adjudication under SIR
content: Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee will sit on a dharna against the Election Commission of India, on March 6 in Kolkata

title: V-P launches remote-controlled drone-based tranquillizer system in Thrissur
content: The drone is equipped with a capture gun, tranquillizer syringe and medication, all operated remotely. Capable of functioning from a distance of up to 500 metres, the system ensures enhanced safety for wildlife experts, assisting personnel and the public during high-risk operations

title: Universal Health Scheme a sham, alleges APCC president Y. S. Sharmila
content: It is a conspiracy to kill Aarogyasri, she alleges, and accuses the TDP-led coalition government of preparing the ground for privatising the health scheme

title: Phase I of Wayanad township inaugurated, keys handed over to 178 families
content: CM says the construction of houses for the remaining beneficiaries is nearing completion and the keys are expected to be handed over before the next monsoon

title: Vice-President C.P. Radhakrishnan lays foundation stone of Chetana Ganashram in Thrissur
content: Vice-President appreciates vision of Chetana Ganashram as an eco-friendly music campus dedicated to music meditation and therapy

title: BJP OBCs Morcha plans to stage protest in Kalaburagi on March 16
content: Agitators to lay a siege to Deputy Commissioner’s office seeking the removal of district in-charge Minister Priyank Kharge

title: Foundation stone laid for ₹260 crore ethanol plant in Nellore district
content: Project at IFFCO Kisan SEZ in Regadichelika village to create 500 to 700 jobs and spur industrial growth in the region, says Nellore MP

title: Escalation in West Asia can disrupt global oil markets and affect India’s economy, says CPI leader Narayana
content: Slamming the ‘authoritarian’ policy of the U.S., the CPI leader calls for balanced diplomacy, rooted in peace and mutual respect

title: Kakinada cracker blast exposes how systemic lapses led to a second tragedy in barely five months
content: Most of the rules prescribed by the two-member inquiry committee constituted by the government after the Konaseema firecracker accident in October last had reportedly not been followed by the ill-fated cracker unit in Kakinada

title: YSRCP demands resignation of TTD Chairman B.R. Naidu
content: individual facing moral allegations is unfit to hold a sacred and responsible position associated with the Tirumala Tirupati Devasthanams, says senior party leader Bhumana Karunakar Reddy

title: PM Modi to chair CCS meeting tonight
content: The meeting is believed to have been convened in the wake of the prevailing global situation following the attack on Iran by the United States and Israel and the killing of Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei

title: Talks on CPI(M) candidates for Assembly elections in final stages in Kannur
content: Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan is set to seek a third consecutive term from Dharmadam and is expected to lead the Left Democratic Front campaign in the district

title: Chief Justice of India Surya Kant lays stone for A.P. Judicial Academy, High Court guest house in Amaravati
content: Justice Surya Kant also inaugurates the High Court judges’ residential enclave at Nelapadu built at a cost of ₹210 crore

title: Forest fire at Horsley Hills brought under control after multi-hour operation
content: Officials say blaze spread from Karnataka side, nearly 50 hectares affected; damage confined to 20 hectares near border and no wildlife loss reported

title: Hundreds of Indians stranded in Dubai, other hub airports after military escalation in West Asia
content: Olympic medallist P.V. Sindhu, JD(S) MLC from Karnataka S.L. Bhojegowda and his family, Bengali actor Subhashree Ganguly along with her son, tourists and student groups are among those held up in Dubai

title: GST eroding financial freedoms of States: K.N. Harilal
content: The situation where indirect taxes are unilaterally determined by the Union government usurps the financial manoeuvrability of the States, says the 7th State Finance Commission chairman

title: Firecracker trade thrives amid rising demand, safety concerns
content: Notwithstanding the sector’s economic contribution and employment generation, the government must strictly enforce safety and pricing regulations to prevent recurring accidents, say industry observers

title: Calicut varsity plans Centre of Excellence in AI
content: A proposal for the purpose, presented by Vice-Chancellor P. Raveendran, was approved at the university’s Syndicate meeting

title: GPs told to make all arrangements for SSLC students to study round the clock at Arivu Kendras
content: The Yadgir administration, the ZP and the Education Department are constantly making hectic efforts to ensure good results this year

title: Temple road-widening project in Varanasi puts livelihoods in peril
content: As bulldozers roll into Dal Mandi in Varanasi to demolish 187 buildings housing over 1,000 shops along the 650-metre road stretch to widen access to the Kashi Vishwanath Temple, thousands of traders and residents confront an uncertain future. The ₹224-crore project has sparked displacement fears, compensation disputes and allegations of selective targeting

title: Ranking MLB's best at every position for 2026: Olney's top 10s
content: ESPN's Buster Olney surveyed players around the industry to help him rank the top 10 players at every position . the objective of this exercise is to identify the best players for the 2026 season, not who might be best in five years or over their career .

title: Men's Bubble Watch: Kentucky, Saint Mary's are locks; Texas should be in
content: teams have roughly two weeks until selection Sunday to strengthen their cases . we'll use a variety of metrics as guides, classifying teams based on how likely they are to make the field of 68 as one of the 37 at-large selections . the selection committee will evaluate a team's underlying potential .
